title: Help deleting duplicate rows created by a webhook
excerpt: I have a board that I’ve set up a webhook to, and it creates rows as new products are adding via another system. The way that system sends info is creating multiple rows for single campaigns. Is there a way to delete dup…

posts.author: crashashley (Ashley)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a board that I’ve set up a webhook to, and it creates rows as new products are adding via another system. The way that system sends info is creating multiple rows for single campaigns. Is there a way to delete duplicates based on a column value (in this example it would a campaign id that singles that the other lines are duplications).

Thanks

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @crashashley,
Welcome to the community

You can delete duplicates using the Duplicates and Uniques app. Here is a demo on how.

posts.author: crashashley (Ashley)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ll check it out - thank you so much!
